title: Addis Housewares Dustpan and Soft Brush Set, Metallic Silver
features: Heavy duty soft nylon bristle fill
Dustpan and brush locks together for storage
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life. Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. Heavy Duty Bristles The heavy-duty high quality nylon soft bristles are ideal for everyday indoor jobs - they allow you to get into those niche areas whilst not having to worry about scratching the surface as you sweep. Dustpan And Brush Lock The dustpan and brush are a perfect fit and so lock together to enable you to store them together without worrying about one going missing. Dimensions Dimensions are w225mm X h315mm X d110mm and the product has a combined weight of only 10g.
